title: Tragacantha sultanensis
taxonomy: Tragacantha sultanensis is classified as a species within the genus Tragacantha, which belongs to the family Fabaceae. The family Fabaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as legumes. intro: Tragacantha sultanensis, also known as Sultan's spiny restharrow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Tragacantha sultanensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
